summary: Show a real Freshservice subdomain example for FRESHSERVICE_DOMAIN (acme.freshservice.com) instead of the generator's token-shaped placeholder, in both `auth status` and `auth setup`. Clarify that the value is the tenant subdomain, not the Freshworks org dashboard.
reason: Greptile P2 on PR #533. The generator emits the same token placeholder for every required env var, but FRESHSERVICE_DOMAIN is a subdomain. A user copying the hint verbatim ends up either with a literal placeholder host (DNS-fails) or guesses at <org>.myfreshworks.com (the Freshworks unified-org dashboard) — exactly the trap that the doctor command was built to diagnose. The hint should not be the on-ramp to the trap. Greptile's second-pass review flagged that `auth setup` was the companion site to the originally-patched `auth status`; both now corrected.
validated_outcome: Both `auth status` (unconfigured) and `auth setup` now print `export FRESHSERVICE_DOMAIN="acme.freshservice.com"` with an inline note about the tenant-vs-dashboard distinction; previously printed the misleading token-shaped placeholder.
